summary: New internal/cost package: per-run USD cost estimation (compute units + RAM-GB-hours) plus p50/p90 projection from local run history and a group-by ledger rollup. Powers the `cost report` command, `run`'s pre-flight cost projection, `run --max-cost` budget enforcement, and `ab run`'s cost-per-novel-item judge.
rationale: Apify bills in compute units + RAM + storage + transfer + PPE; the dashboard shows monthly aggregates and the API exposes raw numbers with no per-run rollup. Cost surprise is the most-cited Apify complaint.
